reviews.review_description: I have to admit huge fan of the dev before even glancing at game but I'm giving credit where credit is due and this guy loves what he does and keeps getting better every game I do play that comes out.This game is fun and very funny. Yep it's got small bugs and or fixes it  needs to b a polished one but that's what early access is all about , in my opinion, it's for us as players 2 gv our feedback so we can actually help him to get it there. I can promise u this also, there isn't a dev , or hasnt been one for me anyway, that  responds, and quickly fixes these things we r making him aware of and that's what type of developer  I want to support and or wanna see succeed like any true gamer should👍 So, simply try it and see what he can do for you😏 cause not once has he left me hanging other then to wk on more, and couldn't be more  happier about that! So now get to doing what u lov and was born to do and I'll b here to continue to b your guinea🐷, support and play any if not all of them!😉Can't wait to see what u do next😍
its fun but every time i try to buy something from the van it won't let me grab it

developer_response.body: Was it all weapons you are having a issue with or just one, i will check there grab set up and update
